The migration tool at /app/src/migrate.cpp is producing wrong output. We've been getting complaints that grayscale images have incorrect normalized_mean values and that records are being retired way too aggressively. The tool is supposed to implement the v3 schema migration described in /app/docs/mill_handoff_dossier.md, but clearly something is off. Those are just the two issues we've caught so far - I wouldn't trust any of the other calculations either.

Fix the C++ code so it correctly implements the specification from the dossier. The normalization formulas, retirement criteria, and any other parameters must match what the current specification says, not whatever legacy values might be in the code. Once the code is correct, rebuild it with make in /app and run the migration using /app/bin/migrate --legacy /app/legacy/features.db --output /app/output/features_v3.db --images /app/images. The checksums and summary in /app/output need to be reproducible, so set MIGRATION_TIMESTAMP=2024-11-15T00:00:00Z when you run the migration.
